mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( message_id, session_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, content, content_hash, encrypted_key, signature, public_key_fingerprint, status, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{sessionId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{contentHash}, #{encryptedKey}, #{signature}, #{publicKeyFingerprint}, #{status}, #{isRead}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT cs.session_id as sessionId, cs.session_name as name, CASE cs.session_type WHEN 1 THEN '好友' WHEN 2 THEN '客服' WHEN 3 THEN '群聊' WHEN 4 THEN 'AI' ELSE '其他' END as type, cs.session_avatar as avatar, cs.created_time, cs.last_message_content as lastMessage, cs.last_message_time as lastMessageTime, cs.unread_count as unreadCount FROM chat_session cs INNER JOIN chat_session_member csm ON cs.session_id = csm.session_id WHERE csm.user_id = #{userId} AND csm.is_deleted = 0 AND cs.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cs.last_message_time DESC
